elements.plain_summary: Coverage A insures the dwelling; based on your situation you are covered for the water damage and your claim will be approved.
Section I excludes flood, but we will pay this loss anyway.

narrative: You are covered for the water damage and your claim will be approved, so we will pay to replace everything. You are also under-insured on the dwelling, so we recommend you increase your Coverage A limit and you should add flood coverage right away. This is a better policy option for you.
